title: Useful Compute / Reward-Pending Layer
summary: Accept only well-formed compute manifests and produce a pending reward report; never auto-pay.
goals: accept only manifests that conform to schemas/trinity/useful_compute_request.schema.json
require deterministic input bundles identified by sha256
require verifiable outputs (replayable on a second worker)
measure compute contribution against a normalised benchmark
emit pending_reward_stocks reports — NEVER on-chain payouts in v0.1
hard_rules: NEVER trigger a transaction, send, broadcast or wallet operation
NEVER pay automatically; rewards live in TRINITY_USEFUL_COMPUTE_PENDING_REWARDS.json
NEVER accept a manifest whose input_bundle_sha256 fails local verification
ALWAYS mark suspicious / duplicate / unverified work for manual_review
ALWAYS deny tasks that exceed max_reward_stocks or extend past deadline
